items.title: Hollander POTD Mitch Richmond. Kansas St SG was drafted 5th by GS in 88 & won ROY. After 3 great yrs, traded to SAC in 91. Continued to put up pts (22+ ppg from 88-98) but stuck in losing situation. 7x all-star & 94-95 all-star MVP. Finished up w/WAS & LAL. HOFer.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Mitch Richmond. Kansas St SG was drafted 5th by GS in 88 & won ROY. After 3 great yrs, traded to SAC in 91. Continued to put up pts (22+ ppg from 88-98) but stuck in losing situation. 7x all-star & 94-95 all-star MVP. Finished up w/WAS & LAL. HOFer.
